diagrams.description: Right triangle with legs of length 3 and 4, and hypotenuse of length 5.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="100%"><polygon points="40,160 160,160 40,40" fill="none" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="3"/><rect x="40" y="150" width="10" height="10" fill="none" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="25" y="105" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#34495e">3</text><text x="95" y="180" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#34495e">4</text><text x="110" y="95" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#34495e">5</text><text x="45" y="158" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#e74c3c">90°</text></svg>

diagrams.description: Circle on a coordinate plane centered at (2, 3) with radius 5.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="100%"><line x1="10" y1="100" x2="190" y2="100" stroke="#bdc3c7" stroke-dasharray="2" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="100" y1="10" x2="100" y2="190" stroke="#bdc3c7" stroke-dasharray="2" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="120" cy="70" r="50" fill="none" stroke="#2980b9" stroke-width="3"/><circle cx="120" cy="70" r="3" fill="#e74c3c"/><line x1="120" y1="70" x2="170" y2="70" stroke="#2ecc71" stroke-width="2"/><text x="105" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#2c3e50">(2, 3)</text><text x="140" y="62" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#27ae60">r = 5</text></svg>

diagrams.description: Solubility curve representing solubility of a solute over varying temperatures.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="100%"><line x1="30" y1="170" x2="180" y2="170" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="30" y1="20" x2="30" y2="170" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M 30,150 Q 80,120 180,40" fill="none" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="3"/><text x="80" y="185" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#34495e">Temp (°C)</text><text x="10" y="90" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#34495e" transform="rotate(-90,10,90)">Solubility (g/100g)</text></svg>
